$comment: MCP server slots. Marked enabled=false until credentials are wired. Real packages will be plugged in when the user provides tokens; until then these are config stubs the bot reads at startup.

google_drive.purpose: upload, download, search, save files; natural-language file finding

google_calendar.purpose: create events, read schedule, set reminders, daily briefing

instagram.purpose: read DMs, post (always confirm with user first), check notifications

image_gen.purpose: generate images from prompt; runs as background task; notifies on completion

web_search.purpose: general search, news lookup, fact checking

yt_dlp.purpose: download audio/video from 1000+ sites; background task; saves to ~/ellen-bot/downloads/

ffmpeg.purpose: compress, convert, extract audio; chains with yt-dlp
